headline: What Progressive (PGR)'s New US$1.5 Billion Bond Issuance Means For Shareholders
summary: In March 2026, The Progressive Corporation completed two fixed-income offerings totaling about US$1.50 billion in callable senior unsecured notes, including 4.6% notes due 2031 and 5.15% notes due 2036, while also announcing additional fixed-rate senior and subordinated unsecured notes. These bond deals, alongside increased institutional interest and ongoing debate about Progressive’s earnings power, highlight how the insurer is actively managing its capital structure amid shifting sector...
